S.FORM: blaq balay qwara qnqya nux ta, lahi zngi qwara qani ga bniq na utux kayal, siki lawkah ta pzimu utux kyal.
S.PHON: βlaq βalaj qwara qnqja nux ta, laħi zŋi qwara qani ɣa βniq na utux kajal, s~ɕiki lawkaħ ta pzimu utux kjal.
S.FORM: blaq balay qwara qnqya nux ta, lahi zngi qwara qani ga bniq na utux kayal, siki lawkah ta pzimu utux kyal.
S.PHON: βlaq βalaj qwara qnqja nux ta, laħi zŋi qwara qani ɣa βniq na utux kajal, s~ɕiki lawkaħ ta pzimu utux kjal.
